request_hint.last_user_message_contains: check if api.github.com returns a 200 status

response.content:
**✅ `api.github.com` returned HTTP `200 OK`.**

A couple of notes from the test:
- The **first request** (no `User-Agent`) got a **403** — GitHub requires a `User-Agent` header per their API rules.
- The **second request** (with `User-Agent: IronClaw-Agent`) succeeded with **200 OK**.

Other details from the successful response:
| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Server | `github.com` |
| API Version | `2022-11-28` |
| Content-Type | `application/json; charset=utf-8` |
| Rate Limit | 55/60 remaining |
